---
title: "Prompt Library"
date: "2026-03-18"
date-modified: "2026-03-18"
description: "Browsable index of all reusable prompt templates."
listing:
  contents:
    - title: "Using the API vs the Browser"
      path: "prompts/00 AI Assistant Meta Prompts/API vs Browser.md"
      categories: [api, ai, sop]
    - title: "Search My AI Assistant"
      path: "prompts/00 AI Assistant Meta Prompts/Search.md"
      categories: []
    - title: "Viewing Vignettes"
      path: "prompts/00 AI Assistant Meta Prompts/Viewing Vignettes.md"
      categories: [api, ai, sop]
  type: table
  fields: [title, categories]
  sort: "title asc"
  filter-ui: true
  sort-ui: true
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

Reusable prompt templates organized by project and topic. Use the search box to filter by title or tags.
